teaching_arc.entry_point: Welcome back, Topic 17 MVT linked slopes; today we classify critical points with f′ sign charts and f″ concavity.
teaching_arc.progression: Hiking metaphor → critical numbers + sign-chart workflow → FDT theorem → warm-up → SDT theorem → standard example → cusp pitfall → tricky sign chart → pause edge case → profit application → visual lab → myth bust → recap.
teaching_arc.destination: Students run full curve-sketch classification: critical numbers, SDT when possible, FDT fallback, endpoint check on closed intervals.

topic_goal: Teach First and Second Derivative Tests with sign-chart workflow, multi-curve flex_plot demos, and inconclusive SDT edge cases.
topic_takeaways: Apply First Derivative Test via sign chart
Apply Second Derivative Test when f″(c)≠0
Fall back to FDT when SDT inconclusive
style_notes: Welcome back, callback Topic 17 MVT and Topic 16 critical points.
theorem_box on s03 FDT and s05 SDT.
nested_bullets sign-chart workflow on s02, s03, s14.
flex_plot f/f′/f″ on same slide, unique expressions per slide, not copy-paste.
math_solution_steps full workflow on s04, s06, s08, s10, s11.
misconception_compare s07 undefined f′, s13 f''=0 myth.
visual_lab s12: three tabs (inc/dec, concavity, inconclusive), demo tab B on video.
pause_and_reveal on s03, s08, s09, s14.
transition_style: Metaphor → definitions → worked examples → pitfalls → pause → application → lab → recap.

slides.narration_seed: Welcome back. Topic 17 gave interior tangent slopes; today we classify flat spots as max, min, or neither using f prime and f double prime.
Four objectives: critical numbers, FDT sign chart, SDT, and inconclusive cases.
Hiking metaphor: f prime tells uphill/downhill; two tests ask sign change and concavity.
Critical numbers: f prime zero or undefined. Sign-chart workflow checklist. x cubed vs x squared at zero.
theorem_box FDT: plus to minus max, minus to plus min. Sign chart steps. pause_and_reveal why both sides matter.
math_solution_steps: f prime 2x-6, c=3, sign minus to plus, local min at (3,-4). flex_plot f, f', f''.
theorem_box SDT: f''>0 min, f''<0 max, f''=0 inconclusive. Topic 17 link. Smile/frown flex_plot.
Critical x=0,2. f''(0)=-6 max, f''(2)=6 min. flex_plot three curves together.
misconception_compare: don't stop at f'=0, include cusp where f' undefined. x^(2/3)(x-1).
Full sign chart: critical 0 and 2/5, pattern plus minus plus. pause_and_reveal. math_solution_steps step_1..step_6.
Pause on (x-1)^4. Predict SDT at x=1. Reveal: f''(1)=0 inconclusive.
f''(1)=0 inconclusive; FDT: f' negative then positive, local min at (1,0).
Profit cubic: local max at 2 but absolute max at endpoint x=5. Topic 16 closed-interval callback.
visual_lab three tabs: x³−3x sign chart, x³−3x²+1 SDT, (x−1)⁴ inconclusive. Demo tab B.
proof_sketch light plus misconception_compare: x^4 has f''(0)=0 but FDT shows minimum.
Three quick checks with answers. Workflow recap. pause_and_reveal exit. Topic 19 optimization next.
